summary: Matched and linked src/melee/mn/mninfobonus.c by flipping its configure.py object status to Matching, reshaping text setup code into helpers, using JOBJ_HIDDEN for JObj flags, and updating GALE01 symbol metadata for mnInfoBonus data/sdata2/bss labels. Bot report records linked code, matched data, and linked data improvements, including mninfobonus .sdata2 and .data reaching 100%.

key_files.role: Main decomp source changed to introduce textSize/textSetup helpers, update GObj/JObj call arguments, replace raw JObj hidden flag values with JOBJ_HIDDEN, and call textSetup from mnInfoBonus_80252F8C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/mn/mninfobonus.c hunk replacing 0x10U with JOBJ_HIDDEN
raw_diff: src/melee/mn/mninfobonus.c hunk replacing inline text setup sequence with textSetup(o)

key_files.role: Build configuration changed mninfobonus.c from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunk Object(NonMatching, "melee/mn/mninfobonus.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/mn/mninfobonus.c")

key_files.role: Symbol metadata updated for mnInfoBonus .data size/local labels, bss local label, and .sdata2 constants changed from global mnInfoBonus_* names to local @ labels.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt hunk changing mnInfoBonus_803EFCE8 size 0x480 to 0x404 and adding ...data.0 plus @332-@335 strings
raw_diff: symbols.txt hunk adding ...bss.0 at mnInfoBonus_804A09B0
raw_diff: symbols.txt hunk replacing mnInfoBonus_804DC268..804DC2B8 globals with local @146..@336 sdata2 labels

what_changed.text: mninfobonus.c was promoted from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py.
Text object setup in mnInfoBonus_80252F8C was factored into a new static textSetup helper, with font_size writes factored into textSize.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: src/melee/mn/mninfobonus.c added textSize and textSetup
raw_diff: src/melee/mn/mninfobonus.c replaced HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC/text font setup/HSD_SisLib_803A6368 sequence with textSetup(o)

what_changed.text: Raw JObj hidden flag constant 0x10U was replaced with JOBJ_HIDDEN in two HSD_JObjSetFlags calls.
Some unsigned integer literal suffixes were removed in GObj_Create, GObj_SetupGXLink, and HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 calls.

GALE01 symbol metadata around mnInfoBonus was adjusted: .data object size was reduced, local labels were added, and multiple .sdata2 constants were made local @ labels rather than global mnInfoBonus_* symbols.
decomp-dev bot reported +2188 linked code bytes, +1240 matched data bytes, +1344 linked data bytes, and two new matches for main/melee/mn/mninfobonus .sdata2 and .data.

smart_moves.text: Kept the PR focused on one translation unit and its required build/symbol metadata, with only three changed files.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py and mninfobonus/symbols hunks only

smart_moves.text: Converted raw flag constants to an existing semantic JObj flag name at the call site, improving readability without adding a new symbol.
Used local symbol labels for mninfobonus literals/constants where the metadata hunk indicates local scope, avoiding broad global mnInfoBonus_* names for those constants.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: .sdata2 mnInfoBonus_804DC268..804DC2B8 replaced by local @ labels

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small helper extraction can be a matching tactic when repeated or tightly coupled setup code needs a particular inline/static boundary; in this PR, text object allocation, font-size writes, and SisLib setup were grouped into textSetup with a separate textSize inline.
When matching code also depends on section ownership, symbol metadata may need to reflect local labels and exact object sizes rather than broad global labels.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: mnInfoBonus_803EFCE8 size and local label changes
raw_diff: sdata2 globals changed to local @ labels
text_corpus: bot report showing mninfobonus .sdata2 and .data new matches

naming_conventions.name: textSize
naming_conventions.convention: Short camelCase helper name describing HSD_Text font_size writes.

naming_conventions.name: textSetup
naming_conventions.convention: Short camelCase static helper for setting up mnInfoBonus text state on the local object struct.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static void textSetup(struct mnInfoBonus_804A09B0_t* o)

naming_conventions.name: JOBJ_HIDDEN
naming_conventions.convention: Prefer named JObj flag constant over raw 0x10U when hiding JObj nodes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_JObjSetFlags calls changed to JOBJ_HIDDEN

naming_conventions.name: @146..@336 and @332..@335
naming_conventions.convention: Literal/constant symbols in mnInfoBonus metadata were represented as local @ labels rather than global mnInfoBonus_* names.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt .data and .sdata2 local label hunks

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Flip object status only after source and metadata changes support a match.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: configure.py changed mninfobonus.c from NonMatching to Matching, and the bot report records linked-code and data-match improvements.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjust inline/static helper boundaries to influence generated code shape.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: The PR replaced an inline text-size helper near mnInfoBonus_80252F8C with textSize plus static textSetup and changed the caller to one helper call.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Correct data symbol sizes/scopes while matching text/data for a translation unit.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: mnInfoBonus_803EFCE8 was resized, local labels were added, and sdata2 constants were localized; bot output reported mninfobonus .sdata2 and .data new matches.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new matches table

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.feedback: Reported linked code 31.91% (+0.06%, +2188 bytes), matched data 34.70% (+0.10%, +1240 bytes), linked data 29.30% (+0.11%, +1344 bytes), with 2 new matches: main/melee/mn/mninfobonus .sdata2 +28 to 100.00% and .data +4 to 100.00%.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, merged state, author, timestamps, changed-file counts
text_corpus: empty PR body and one bot report
raw_pr_json: PR body null and merged_at present
notes: The diff and bot report strongly support what changed and the reported matching/linking deltas.
There were no human review comments and no PR body, so author intent and review rationale are not directly evidenced.
No local build, objdiff, or checkdiff logs are included beyond the decomp-dev bot aggregate report.
The PR was merged, but this intake does not independently validate the match.

accepted_candidate_records.title: mninfobonus matched with helper-boundary reshaping and symbol metadata cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2242 matched and linked mninfobonus by changing helper boundaries around text setup, using JOBJ_HIDDEN instead of raw 0x10U, flipping configure.py to Object(Matching), and updating mnInfoBonus symbol metadata/local labels. Bot output reported +2188 linked code bytes and mninfobonus .sdata2/.data reaching 100%.

source_update_candidates.title: mninfobonus.c marked Matching in configure.py as of PR 2242
source_update_candidates.text: configure.py changed Object(NonMatching, "melee/mn/mninfobonus.c") to Object(Matching, "melee/mn/mninfobonus.c") in PR 2242.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a source-owned path/build-status fact and should be curated against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: mninfobonus symbol metadata localized constants and labels in PR 2242
source_update_candidates.text: config/GALE01/symbols.txt adjusted mnInfoBonus_803EFCE8 size to 0x404, added local .data/.bss labels, and changed mnInfoBonus .sdata2 constants to local @ labels.
source_update_candidates.reason: Symbol ownership and section metadata are source facts; curator should verify against current symbols before updating path facts or data sheets.

source_update_candidates.title: Named JObj flag constants improve reviewability when equivalent to raw flag literals
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2242 replaced 0x10U with JOBJ_HIDDEN in HSD_JObjSetFlags calls while matching mninfobonus.
source_update_candidates.reason: This may reinforce existing typed/named-field cleanup guidance, but a single PR should not be promoted as a new global rule without curator review.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all unsigned suffix removals improve matching; this PR only shows those literal changes occurred in mninfobonus.
Do not generalize local @ label conversion to all floats or strings; this PR only supports mnInfoBonus metadata changes shown in symbols.txt.
Do not claim human reviewer approval rationale; no human review comments were present in the loaded evidence.
